subcodes.first_line: This is a Day of joy and bliss, for all things proclaim "The Promised One is come!" Blessed is the soul that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوم یوم فرح و سرورست جمیع اشیاء بقد اتی الموعود ناطق طوبی از برای نفسیکه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence
